rules.description: Morning session (06:00-12:00 UTC) consistently wins 71% across instruments

rules.description: Require confidence >= 70% before any trade entry

rules.description: Block trades in illiquid market regime — 28% WR confirmed

rules.description: Penalize confidence -15 points in ranging regime — 25% WR confirmed

rules.description: Widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR minimum — Kelly=-0.167 at 1.0x ATR, R:R=0.91 creates structural negative EV
100d backtest: 70-80% confidence bin = 45.2% WR (-$2,740), degraded from 58.6% in full dataset.
SHORT trades outperform LONG (46.4% WR vs 39.5% WR). Active short_direction_veto blocks the better-performing side.
HYPE accounts for 68% of total losses. Size cap reduces risk without affecting signal quality.

AUTO-FIX Run 130: LLM graduated_rules.json restored from 1→11 rules. 10 critical rules reactivated: night_block, hype_long_veto, illiquid_block, ranging_penalty, hype_short_highconf_veto, hype_sizing_cap, sol_short_boost, btc_long_boost, confidence_paradox_sizing, instant_sl_buffer. Root cause: llm/graduated_rules.py overwrites file on hypothesis graduation (overwrite bug).
